Phase 10 gaps closed: signup timezone + requireSession lastActiveAt
Phase 12 scope locked from user Q&A
Track B MVP: personas.json + playwright/sdk deps + icp-funnel-sim.ts harness + npm run qa:icp + README
First ICP report (Sarah/Alex/Priya) — 3/3 would_consider; surfaced harness capture bug + microline opportunity
Run 2 (Sarah-delta + Marcus + Dave; Marcus converted) + harness 5-capture refactor + landing fixes (microline visibility bump + v13 in subhead + ~30-min lesson + bolded 4)

remaining_tasks.name: Landing: add one named human + credential (closes Sarah's #1 across both runs + Dave's hobbyist worry)
remaining_tasks.blocker: needs founder name + credential to claim (OSCP/CEH/OSWE/etc.) and whether to add /about page or footer signature

remaining_tasks.name: Landing: rename 'Field-notes from people doing the work' to 'From the lab notebook' or repurpose for real practitioner notes (Sarah misframed it in both runs; Dave + Alex agreed)
Landing: tighten refund threshold language — '80% of CEH v13 pass mark' is ~56% raw which is a low refund bar (Priya + Sarah-v2 caught)
Landing: add a code snippet pull-quote on bonus cards so depth is visible without clicking through (Sarah both runs + Priya run 1)
Wire nightly cron at 03:00 UTC for icp-funnel-sim (decision logged in run-1 scope)
Track A: Vitest + Playwright + MSW + supertest deterministic suite

v2_roadmap_items_from_qa.summary: No team/seats purchase path. Triggers v2 billing scope. Dave is correctly priced but can't buy 6 seats. CEH is largely compliance/audit-driven so the buyer is often not the user — this is real B2B money on the table.
Hobbyist-vs-real-product. No about-the-company, no team-behind-it, no enterprise signals. CISO defense ammunition missing. Triggers v2 brand work + customer logos / pass-rate data once available.

No advanced/post-cert track visible. The bonus library (HexStrike-AI, sqlmap workflows) hints at depth but the curriculum grid doesn't reference it. Engineer-tier ICP wants a 'Pro+' or 'post-cert CTF lane' tease.

CEH v13 specifically added AI/ML attack content as a domain. Curriculum source check needed: either fold under another module + label explicitly, or add it. For a v13-marketed product in 2026, the absence is a v13-specific liability.

human_actions_pending.action: Decide founder credential + page placement for Sarah/Dave's 'no named human' friction
human_actions_pending.context: Highest-leverage still-open landing fix. Needs OSCP/CEH/OSWE/etc. credential + LinkedIn or /about page decision.

human_actions_pending.action: Provide ANTHROPIC_API_KEY in CI environment to wire up nightly cron
human_actions_pending.context: icp-funnel-sim.ts harness reads process.env.ANTHROPIC_API_KEY directly; exits cleanly without it (CI-safe). Both report runs so far used the host Claude Code session's API path (orchestrator-fan-out) at $0 cost. The standalone harness is shipped and tested but never run with a real key.

decisions.decision: Phase 12 split into Track A (deterministic) + Track B (ICP simulation); Track B first
decisions.rationale: User's detailed answers made Track B the headline; Track A defers until B proves valuable

decisions.decision: Test stack with mocking: Vitest + Playwright + MSW + supertest
decisions.rationale: User chose 'with mocking' over leaner Vitest+Playwright only

decisions.decision: Sonnet 4.6 for per-step ICP vision pass; Haiku 4.5 for chain-of-critique synthesis
decisions.rationale: Vision needs Sonnet; re-reading notes is cheap, Haiku is sufficient
User explicit choice; safer for v1, humans own merge call

decisions.decision: Chain-of-critique: 3 passes (notes / re-read for missed observations / aggregate)
decisions.rationale: User chose chain over single-pass to catch second-order issues

decisions.decision: Whole-repo nightly cron (03:00 UTC), not per-PR
decisions.rationale: User picked nightly for whole-funnel coverage

decisions.decision: MVP shape: landing-page-only first; expand surface phase-by-phase
decisions.rationale: Avoid building wrong abstraction before knowing what good critique looks like
Prevents runaway loops; ~$30/mo at 3 personas nightly is acceptable

decisions.decision: tsx as TypeScript runner for scripts/
decisions.rationale: Modern, no ts-node config burden; aligns with Node 20+ engines field

decisions.decision: 5-capture spec for landing screenshots (4 viewport + 1 fullpage), not 3
decisions.rationale: Run-1 found that 3 captures at scrollY=0/0.5/1.0 missed the mock-terminal section entirely — all 3 agents independently surfaced 'lab told not shown' which was a CAPTURE artifact, not a page bug. Verified by full-page in run 2. Both harness paths updated.

decisions.decision: Numeric findings from agent vision require source cross-reference
decisions.rationale: Run 1 & 2 reproduced numeric drift across multiple agents: '4' read as 'x'/'a', '80%' read as '60%'/'80%'. Small grey monospace numerals are unreliable through vision. Future runs should validate any quoted number against rendered HTML or repo source.

decisions.decision: Team/seats path deferred to v2 billing milestone
decisions.rationale: Dave's #1 friction is real B2B money on the table but adding marketing copy for infrastructure that doesn't exist (Phase 4 billing) would over-promise. Captured in v2_roadmap_items_from_qa for future scope.

next_action: Decide on the highest-leverage still-open landing fix (named human + credential, from Sarah/Dave). Then either wire nightly cron, or move to Phase 11 (post-engagement email — winback/streak), or close milestone via /gsd:audit-milestone.
context_notes: Track B MVP complete and validated through 2 ICP simulation runs (Sarah/Alex/Priya in run 1, Sarah-delta/Marcus/Dave in run 2). All 5 ICPs in personas.json have been exercised. Marcus converted with HIGH confidence in run 2 — first proof the harness loop produces actionable persona-distinct verdicts. Landing fixes shipped this session: (1) microline visibility bump with 'no card to start' in lime accent, (2) CEH v13 bolded inline in hero subhead, (3) ~30-min lesson per-day estimate, (4) bolded `4` in subhead to kill numeric vision misread. Harness fixes: 5-capture spec (4 viewport + 1 fullpage) in both icp-funnel-sim.ts and _capture-once.ts. Reports at .planning/qa-reports/2026-05-20-landing.md (run 1) + .planning/qa-reports/2026-05-20-landing-run2.md (run 2). Build green. Typecheck green. Cost so far: $0 — both runs used orchestrator-Claude fan-out, not direct API. Phase 12 ready to either expand (named-human, surface-expansion to signup/curriculum/exam) or close.
